source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, given \( E = 9V \), \( I_k = 6mA \), when the voltage source \( E \) alone is applied, the current through \( R_L \) is 1mA. When both the voltage source \( E \) and current source \( I_k \) are applied together, the current through \( R_L \) is \( I_L \) ( ).
